dict.string: Froglips uses the microphone for voice-to-text dictation in chat.
Froglips uses speech recognition to convert dictated audio into text.
Froglips agents read and write to your Desktop when you ask them to — for example saving a generated report or reading a file you mentioned.
Froglips agents read and write to your Documents folder when you ask them to — for example saving a generated report or reading a file you mentioned.
Froglips agents read and write to your Downloads folder when you ask them to — for example reading a file you just downloaded.
Froglips agents read and write to external drives when you ask them to.
Froglips agents read and write to network volumes when you ask them to.
